# PrivaTools

> 107 free, open-source file tools — PDF, image, video, and developer utilities. All processing happens on your server. Zero uploads to third parties, zero tracking, zero sign-ups.

PrivaTools is a privacy-first alternative to iLovePDF, Smallpdf, and Adobe Acrobat Online. Every file is processed locally and deleted immediately — never stored, never read, never shared.

## Key Facts

- 107 tools: 78 PDF tools + 29 non-PDF tools
- 100% free, no premium tiers, 500 MB upload limit per file
- Open source under MIT license
- Self-hostable via Docker
- No account or sign-up required
- Files processed and deleted within minutes
- Contact: hello@privatools.me
- Privacy Policy: https://privatools.me/privacy
- Terms of Service: https://privatools.me/terms

## PDF Tools

### Merge & Split
- [Merge PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/merge-pdf): Combine multiple PDFs into one file
- [Split PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/split-pdf): Divide a PDF into separate files by page range
- [Split by Bookmarks](https://privatools.me/tool/split-by-bookmarks): Split PDF by chapters or bookmarks automatically
- [Split by Size](https://privatools.me/tool/split-by-size): Split large PDFs into smaller files by maximum file size
- [Alternate Mix](https://privatools.me/tool/alternate-mix): Interleave pages from two PDFs for duplex scanning

### Edit & Annotate
- [Edit PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/edit-pdf): Modify text and images directly inside your PDF
- [Sign PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/sign-pdf): Draw, type, or upload your signature onto any PDF
- [E-Sign PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/esign-pdf): Electronically sign documents without printing
- [Annotate PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/annotate-pdf): Add highlights, underlines, strikethrough, and sticky notes
- [Add Shapes](https://privatools.me/tool/add-shapes): Draw rectangles, circles, lines, and arrows
- [Watermark PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/watermark): Apply text or image watermarks to every page
- [Stamp PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/stamp-pdf): Add CONFIDENTIAL, DRAFT, APPROVED, or custom stamps
- [Add Hyperlinks](https://privatools.me/tool/add-hyperlinks): Add clickable hyperlinks to PDF
- [Add Attachment](https://privatools.me/tool/add-attachment): Embed files inside a PDF
- [Fill Form](https://privatools.me/tool/fill-form): Fill interactive PDF forms online
- [Form Creator](https://privatools.me/tool/form-creator): Create fillable PDF forms with text fields, checkboxes, dropdowns
- [White-Out](https://privatools.me/tool/whiteout-pdf): Place white rectangles over content to hide it

### Page Management
- [Organize Pages](https://privatools.me/tool/organize-pages): Drag and drop to reorder, delete, rotate, or duplicate pages
- [Delete Pages](https://privatools.me/tool/delete-pages): Remove specific pages from a PDF
- [Extract Pages](https://privatools.me/tool/extract-pages): Save specific pages as a new PDF
- [Remove Blank Pages](https://privatools.me/tool/remove-blank-pages): Automatically remove blank or near-blank pages
- [Reverse PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/reverse-pdf): Reverse page order of a PDF
- [Rotate PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/rotate-pdf): Rotate pages by 90, 180, or 270 degrees
- [N-Up PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/nup): Print multiple pages per sheet
- [Booklet PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/booklet-pdf): Rearrange pages for booklet printing

### Headers, Footers & Numbers
- [Page Numbers](https://privatools.me/tool/page-numbers): Add page numbers with custom format and position
- [Header & Footer](https://privatools.me/tool/header-footer): Add headers and footers with text, dates, page numbers
- [Bates Numbering](https://privatools.me/tool/bates-numbering): Add sequential Bates stamps for legal document indexing
- [Bookmarks](https://privatools.me/tool/bookmarks): Create, rename, reorder, and nest bookmarks
- [QR Code](https://privatools.me/tool/qr-code): Add QR codes to PDF pages

### Optimize & Transform
- [Compress PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/compress-pdf): Reduce file size by up to 90% without losing quality
- [Batch Compress PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/batch-compress-pdf): Compress up to 50 PDFs in parallel, download as ZIP
- [Flatten PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/flatten-pdf): Merge form fields and annotations into static content
- [Deskew PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/deskew-pdf): Correct tilt angle of scanned documents
- [Repair PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/repair-pdf): Fix corrupted or broken PDF files
- [Resize PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/resize-pdf): Change page dimensions to A4, Letter, Legal, or custom sizes
- [Crop PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/crop-pdf): Trim margins or change visible area of pages
- [Remove Margins](https://privatools.me/tool/auto-crop): Auto-detect and trim white space
- [Grayscale PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/grayscale-pdf): Convert color PDFs to black and white
- [Invert Colors](https://privatools.me/tool/invert-colors): Invert colors for dark mode reading
- [Transparent Background](https://privatools.me/tool/transparent-background): Convert white backgrounds to transparency
- [Overlay PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/overlay): Layer one PDF on top of another
- [Compare PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/compare-pdf): Visual diff of two PDF versions
- [PDF Page Counter](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-page-counter): Count pages in up to 100 PDFs at once

### Security & Privacy
- [Protect PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/protect-pdf): Encrypt with AES-256 and set passwords
- [Unlock PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/unlock-pdf): Remove password from PDFs you own
- [Redact PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/redact-pdf): Permanently black out sensitive information
- [Strip Metadata](https://privatools.me/tool/strip-metadata): Remove author, dates, GPS, and all hidden metadata
- [Sanitize PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/sanitize-pdf): Remove hidden data, JavaScript, and embedded files
- [Set Permissions](https://privatools.me/tool/set-permissions): Control who can print, copy, edit, or annotate
- [Delete Annotations](https://privatools.me/tool/delete-annotations): Remove all highlights, comments, and markup
- [Metadata Editor](https://privatools.me/tool/metadata): View and edit PDF metadata fields
- [PDF/A Validator](https://privatools.me/tool/pdfa-validator): Check PDF/A archival compliance
- [Verify Signature](https://privatools.me/tool/verify-signature): Inspect digital signature fields
- [OCR PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/ocr-pdf): Convert scanned documents to searchable text (100+ languages)

### Convert to PDF
- [HTML to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/html-to-pdf): Convert web pages or HTML files to PDF
- [Image to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/image-to-pdf): Combine JPG, PNG, TIFF, WebP into a PDF
- [Word to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/word-to-pdf): Convert .docx to PDF
- [Excel to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/excel-to-pdf): Convert .xlsx spreadsheets to PDF
- [PowerPoint to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/pptx-to-pdf-convert): Convert .pptx presentations to PDF
- [Office to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/office-to-pdf): Convert any Office document to PDF
- [Markdown to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/markdown-to-pdf): Convert .md files to formatted PDF
- [CSV to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/csv-to-pdf): Convert CSV spreadsheets to PDF
- [Text to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/txt-to-pdf): Convert .txt files to PDF
- [JSON to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/json-to-pdf): Convert JSON data to formatted PDF
- [XML to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/xml-to-pdf): Convert XML data to formatted PDF
- [EPUB to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/epub-to-pdf): Convert e-books to PDF
- [RTF to PDF](https://privatools.me/tool/rtf-to-pdf): Convert Rich Text Format to PDF
- [PDF to PDF/A](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-pdfa): Convert to archival standard

### Convert from PDF
- [PDF to Word](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-word): Extract text into editable .docx
- [PDF to Excel](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-excel): Extract tables into .xlsx spreadsheets
- [PDF to PowerPoint](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-pptx): Create a PPTX where each page is a slide
- [PDF to Image](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-image): Render pages as JPG or PNG
- [PDF to Text](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-text): Extract all readable text
- [PDF to EPUB](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-epub): Convert to e-book format
- [PDF to Markdown](https://privatools.me/tool/pdf-to-markdown): Convert to Markdown with heading detection
- [Extract Tables](https://privatools.me/tool/extract-tables): Extract tabular data to CSV
- [Extract Images](https://privatools.me/tool/extract-images): Download all embedded images

## Image Tools
- [Image Compressor](https://privatools.me/tools/image-compressor): Reduce JPEG, PNG, WebP sizes by up to 80%
- [Image Converter](https://privatools.me/tools/image-converter): Convert between WebP, PNG, JPG, TIFF, BMP, HEIC
- [HEIC to JPG](https://privatools.me/tools/heic-to-jpg): Convert iPhone HEIC photos to JPG
- [Remove EXIF](https://privatools.me/tools/remove-exif): Strip GPS, camera info, and metadata from photos
- [Resize & Crop](https://privatools.me/tools/resize-crop-image): Set exact dimensions or aspect ratios
- [Remove Background](https://privatools.me/tools/remove-background): Automatically remove image backgrounds
- [SVG to PNG](https://privatools.me/tools/svg-to-png): Convert vector graphics to raster images
- [Image Watermark](https://privatools.me/tools/image-watermark): Add text or image watermarks to photos
- [Favicon Generator](https://privatools.me/tools/generate-favicon): Generate ICO, PNG, SVG favicons
- [Photo Collage](https://privatools.me/tools/make-collage): Arrange images into grid layouts
- [Merge Images](https://privatools.me/tools/merge-images): Combine images side by side or stacked
- [Image OCR](https://privatools.me/tools/image-ocr): Extract text from images (40+ languages)
- [Image Upscaler](https://privatools.me/tool/image-upscaler): Enlarge images 2x or 4x with Lanczos resampling

## Video & Audio Tools
- [Video to GIF](https://privatools.me/tools/video-to-gif): Convert video clips to animated GIFs
- [Extract Audio](https://privatools.me/tools/extract-audio): Pull audio from video as MP3, WAV, or OGG
- [Trim Video/Audio](https://privatools.me/tools/trim-media): Cut clips with visual timeline
- [Compress Video](https://privatools.me/tools/compress-video): Reduce video file size for sharing
- [Audio Converter](https://privatools.me/tool/audio-converter): Convert between MP3, WAV, OGG, FLAC, AAC

## Developer Tools
- [JSON/XML Formatter](https://privatools.me/tools/json-xml-formatter): Prettify, validate, and highlight syntax
- [Text Diff](https://privatools.me/tools/text-diff): Line-by-line comparison of two texts
- [Base64 Encoder/Decoder](https://privatools.me/tools/base64): Convert to and from Base64
- [Hash Generator](https://privatools.me/tools/hash-generator): MD5, SHA-1, SHA-256, SHA-512 from text or files
- [CSV to JSON](https://privatools.me/tools/csv-json): Convert between CSV and JSON formats
- [Markdown to HTML](https://privatools.me/tools/markdown-html): Convert between Markdown and HTML
- [Barcode Generator](https://privatools.me/tools/generate-barcode): Create Code 128, QR, EAN-13, UPC barcodes
- [QR Code Reader](https://privatools.me/tools/qr-reader): Decode QR codes from images
- [URL to PDF](https://privatools.me/tools/url-to-pdf): Convert any web page to PDF

## Archive Tools
- [Extract Archive](https://privatools.me/tools/extract-archive): Extract ZIP, RAR, 7Z, TAR files
- [Create ZIP](https://privatools.me/tools/create-zip): Compress files into ZIP archives

- [vs iLovePDF](https://privatools.me/compare/ilovepdf)
- [vs Smallpdf](https://privatools.me/compare/smallpdf)
- [vs Adobe Acrobat](https://privatools.me/compare/adobe-acrobat)
- [vs Sejda](https://privatools.me/compare/sejda)
- [vs PDF24](https://privatools.me/compare/pdf24)
- [vs Foxit](https://privatools.me/compare/foxit)
- [vs LightPDF](https://privatools.me/compare/lightpdf)
- [vs Stirling PDF](https://privatools.me/compare/stirling-pdf)
- [vs DocHub](https://privatools.me/compare/dochub)
- [vs PDFescape](https://privatools.me/compare/pdfescape)
- [vs Nitro PDF](https://privatools.me/compare/nitro-pdf)

## Source Code
- GitHub: https://github.com/taiyeba-dg/privatools
